name: Mischief of the Time Goddess
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪戯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いたずら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this card's activation. Cannot be activated as Chain Link 2 or higher. At the end of your Battle Phase, if all monsters you control are "Valkyrie" monsters (min. 1): Send this card to the GY, also, immediately after this effect resolves, skip to the start of the Battle Phase of your next turn. If you do, you cannot activate "Mischief of the Time Goddess" until the end of that turn.
eff: Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this card's activation. Cannot be activated as Chain Link 2 or higher. At the end of your Battle Phase, if all monsters you control are "Valkyrie" monsters (min. 1): Send this card to the GY, also, immediately after this effect resolves, skip to the start of the Battle Phase of your next turn. If you do, you cannot activate "Mischief of the Time Goddess" until the end of that turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
